arts.ttl: Marco Asensio speaks out after double Aston Villa penalty miss
arts.sum: The Spaniard saw Aaron Ramsdale save both his second half spot-kicks but his blushes were spared as Ollie Watkins, Donyell Malen and John McGinn all scored to lift Villa to a 3-0 victory and fifth in the table. Marco Asensio has publicly addressed his two missed penalties in Aston Villa’s win at Southampton.

arts.ttl: Tottenham “believe they can tempt” 14-G/A Aston Villa target to join them
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur are keen on signing the Chelsea attacker Noni Madueke at the end of the season. The 23-year-old has done quite well for the Blues this season, and he has 14 goal contributions in all competitions. He is reportedly on the radar of Aston Villa as well. arts.ttl: Unai Emery to mull Aston Villa penalty takers after Marco Asensio’s double miss
arts.sum: Asensio saw both of his spot-kicks saved in Villa’s 3-0 win at relegated Southampton.

arts.sum: Marcus Rashford didn't have a huge impact on Aston Villa's win at Southampton - but the finger is being pointed at Unai Emery.

arts.ttl: Ollie Watkins the hero as Aston Villa see off stubborn Southampton to go fifth
arts.sum: Watkins came off the bench to score the opener.

arts.sum: Liverpool are reportedly one of the clubs eyeing up a surprise potential transfer move for a new goalkeeper who could cost around €12m.
